title: callitropsis × leylandii
intro: Callitropsis × leylandii, also known as Leyland cypress, is a popular evergreen coniferous tree that is a hybrid of Callitropsis nootkatensis and Cupressus macrocarpa. It has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Leyland cypress include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting relaxation. The herbal preparations of Leyland cypress include essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to soothe respiratory issues, promote relaxation, and even reduce stress and anxiety.
